message:
feat(rchd): Add comprehensive observability with Prometheus metrics

Implements full observability stack for the RCH daemon including:

Metrics:
- Worker metrics (status, slots, latency, last_seen)
- Circuit breaker metrics (state, failures, trips, recoveries)
- Build metrics (total, active, duration, queue_depth, classification)
- Transfer metrics (bytes, files, duration, compression)
- Daemon metrics (uptime, info, connections, requests)
- Decision latency histogram with sub-ms buckets (AGENTS.md compliance)
- Budget violation tracking for <1ms non-compilation/<5ms compilation
- Classification tier breakdown metrics

HTTP Endpoints:
- /metrics - Prometheus text format export
- /health - Daemon health check
- /ready - Readiness probe (workers available)
- /budget - AGENTS.md performance budget status

Also adds Unix socket handlers for metrics/health/ready/budget.
Dependencies: prometheus, lazy_static, axum, tower, hyper
All 83 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
